zh.lifeSummary: 當Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe於1529年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛索普 煙雨 維斯特比時，他的父親Richard Coney29歲，母親Jane Ellis29歲。他於1554年11月6日與Lady Alice Leigh在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1611年10月15日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛索普享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe于1529年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛索普 煙雨 維斯特比时，他的父亲Richard Coney29岁，母亲Jane Ellis29岁。他于1554年11月6日与Lady Alice Leigh在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1611年10月15日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛索普享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Esq.
meanings: Cornish: A Cornish form of Just (Prouter Est, the priest of St. Just).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe was born in 1529, in Bassingthorpe with Westby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Coney, was 29 and his mother, Jane Ellis, was 29. He married Lady Alice Leigh on 6 November 1554, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 15 October 1611, in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe est né en 1529, à Bassingthorpe with Westby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Coney, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jane Ellis, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Leigh le 6 novembre 1554, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1611, à Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe è nato il nel 1529 nel Bassingthorpe with Westby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Coney, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Jane Ellis, aveva 29 anni. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpeが1529年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンソルペ ウィス ウエストビーで生まれた時，父Richard Coneyは29歳，母Jane Ellisは29歳であった。1554年11月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでLady Alice Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1611年10月15日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンソルペで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe(이)가 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징소 위스 웨스트비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Coney(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Ellis(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1554년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Lady Alice Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징소에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징소에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe родился в 1529 г. в местности бассингтаурп вит вестби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Coney было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Ellis, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Leigh 6 ноября 1554 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 15 октября 1611 г. в местности бассингтаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности бассингтаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe nació en 1529, en Bassingthorpe with Westby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Coney, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jane Ellis, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Leigh el 6 de noviembre de 1554, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1611, en Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
